runTitle: Vercel Release Smoke - v8.12.1 AI Grounding Release
coveredSurfaces: GitLab tag pipeline v8.12.1 completed successfully with frontend deploy, AI Engine deploy, frontend post-deploy smoke, and AI Engine post-deploy smoke
Vercel production deployment dpl_FrMjb4v1eLLxXCYTAToTunPivZWf was Ready for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
Production GET / returned the OpenManager AI landing page during release script smoke
Production GET /login returned the login page during release script smoke
Production /api/health returned healthy with database, cache, and AI connected
Cloud Run /health returned status ok and version 8.12.1
Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00503-sq8 is serving 100% traffic
Vercel usage check passed with effective 14.0014 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 12180
skippedSurfaces: Broad browser matrix was not rerun because this was a release deployment smoke focused on version propagation, health, and CI smoke closure
Production conversational AI QA was not rerun in this release-smoke record to avoid repeated live LLM usage; AI grounding behavior was covered by local contract/unit gates before deploy
Vision real-image QA was not in scope because this release did not change Vision routing or provider behavior

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag deploy pipeline completed all frontend and AI Engine deployment/smoke jobs, Vercel production is Ready, Cloud Run serves ai-engine-00503-sq8 at 100% traffic, and both production health endpoints are green.
The release-facing smoke covered production route/version propagation and backend health while the AI grounding change had already passed targeted/full AI Engine tests and root contract/lint gates.
The AI grounding release reached production with CI smoke closure; behavior-specific grounding regressions were covered by deterministic tool/routing tests before deployment.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after v8.12.1 production release smoke; effective 14.0014 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 12180.

completedImprovements.title: v8.12.1 AI grounding release deployed and smoke verified on production
completedImprovements.evidence: GitLab tag pipeline 2544691552 succeeded; Vercel deployment dpl_FrMjb4v1eLLxXCYTAToTunPivZWf is Ready; Cloud Run revision ai-engine-00503-sq8 serves 100% traffic; production /api/version and health checks passed.

notes: The initial pending period was caused by the self-hosted runner processing the preceding main validate jobs before the tag deploy job; no resource queue remained after runner assignment.
Production version smoke initially observed 8.12.0 until the GitLab deploy job promoted the new Vercel deployment; it passed on attempt 50/81.
Cloud Build 09ff9465-57b4-48aa-8f51-af7783488cc2 used the default machine type.
